code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if string.len(cur) > 0
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(cur) > 0
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

let cnt = list.len(nums)
mut out = ""
mut j = cnt - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
  end
  if j == cnt - 1
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end

println(out)
